MOTION Notice For Order Substituing Personal Representative For Deceased Defendant And Granting Leave To File Supplemental Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-19-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Neli N. Palma, Esq., DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-3921, for plaintiff City and County of San Francisco and the People of the State of California, moving to substitute personal representative for deceased defendant and for Leave To File Supplemental Complaint

Ruling:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL and THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION For Order Substituing Personal Representative For Deceased Defendant And Granting Leave To File Supplemental Complaint -- Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/JLW/JU) JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, CSR: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
